[[Barry Banks (rugby league)|Barry Banks]] (uncle) }} }} '''Thomas Saxton''' (born 3 October 1983) is an English former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who last played for the [[York City Knights]] in [[RFL League 1|Kingstone Press League 1]], usually as a {{rlp|fb}}, but also as a {{rlp|wg}} or {{rlp|ce}}.{{cite web|url=http://news.bbc.co.uk/sport1/hi/rugby_league/1088205.stm|title=Wildcats overpower Tigers|publisher=BBC|date=2000-12-26|accessdate=2008-05-05}} He has previously played for the [[Castleford Tigers]], [[Hull FC]], [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield Trinity Wildcats]] and the [[Salford Red Devils|Salford City Reds]] in the [[Super League]]. Also he has represented [[England Knights|England A-Team]] and England Academy.{{cite web|url= http://news.bbc.co.uk/sport1/hi/rugby_league/super_league/wakefield/4865424.stm|title=Wakefield snap up loanee Saxton|publisher=BBC|date=2006-03-31|accessdate=2008-05-05}} Saxton played for Hull in the [[2005 Challenge Cup]] Final from the interchange bench in their victory against the [[Leeds Rhinos]].{{cite news|title=Hull stun Leeds in Challenge Cup|url=http://news.bbc.co.uk/sport2/hi/rugby_league/challenge_cup/4169230.stm|accessdate=17 August 2013|newspaper=[[BBC News]]|date=27 August 2005}} He played for six seasons with [[Featherstone Rovers]] before moving to [[Halifax R.L.F.C.|Halifax]] in 2015. In November 2016 he signed for York having joined the club on-loan earlier in the year.{{cite news|url=http://www.yorkpress.co.uk/sport/14925043.Another_boost_for_York_City_Knights_hopes___Super_League_veteran_and_a_Championship_starlet_commit_for_2017/ |title=Tommy Saxton and Danny Sowerby confirmed in 2017 York City Knights ranks |work=[[The Press (York)|The Press]] |date=24 November 2016 |accessdate=30 November 2017}} ==Genealogical information== Tommy Saxton is the brother of the rugby league footballer; [[Nicky Saxton]], and the nephew of the rugby league footballer; [[Alan Banks (rugby league)|Alan Banks]].{{citation needed|date=February 2020}} ==References== {{reflist}} ==External links== *[https://yorkcityknights.com/the-club/#players York City Knights profile] *(archived by web.archive.org) [https://web.archive.org/web/20121113091930/http://featherstonerovers.net/team_member.php?id=617 Profile at featherstonerovers.net] {{Hull F.C. - 2005 Challenge Cup Final winners}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Saxton, Tommy}} [[Category:1983 births]] [[Category:Living people]] [[Category:Castleford Tigers players]] [[Category:English rugby league players]] [[Category:Featherstone Rovers players]] [[Category:Halifax Panthers players]] [[Category:Hull F.C. players]] [[Category:Rugby league centres]] [[Category:Rugby league fullbacks]] [[Category:Rugby league players from Pontefract]] [[Category:Rugby league wingers]] [[Category:Salford RLFC players]] [[Category:Wakefield Trinity players]] [[Category:York Knights players]] [[Category:21st-century English sportsmen]] {{England-rugbyleague-bio-stub}}
